## Objective

## Authority and provenance review

Describe permissions, side effects, persistent writes, rollback, and 10th-Man triggers.

## 10th-Man countercase

State the strongest credible reason this implementation could be wrong or unsafe.

## Stop condition

Stop when all acceptance criteria pass. Do not invent adjacent infrastructure.
